task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N120 api-design-recommendation artifact. The ground truth is at: API设计.md (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.API设计.md:
```yaml
artifact_schema_version: n150.v2.1.0
skill_name: api-design-recommendation
produced_event: produced.n150.api_design.v2
blocker_mapping: B-N150-01
correlation_id: "cinemaai-n150-20240528-001"
contract_fingerprint: "f3a7b9c2d1e8f4a6b7c9d0e1f2a3b4c5"
fingerprint_version: "1"
selected_mode: from_intent
readiness: confirmed
evidence_profile:
  intent_source: "接口意图清单.csv (037)"
  upstream_artifacts:
    - "开发需求解析.md (N120)"
    - "技术方案分析.md (N130)"
    - "数据对象清单.csv (N070)"
    - "权限矩阵.csv (N070)"
  confidence: high
metadata:
  function_bias: direct_result
  stage_position: technical_solution_design.api_design.contract_design
  node_artifact_target: 接口设计草案.yaml
  workflow_node: N150
  contract_fingerprint: "f3a7b9c2d1e8f4a6b7c9d0e1f2a3b4c5"
  fingerprint_version: "1"
api_policy:
  style: rest
  versioning: uri
  pagination: cursor
  filter: query_params
  response_envelope: {data: "", meta: {cursor: "", has_more: true, count: 0}, errors: []}
  error_format: {code: "", message: "", details: {field: "", reason: ""}}
  idempotency: "idempotency-key"
  request_id: "X-Request-ID"
  auth_baseline: "Bearer JWT"
  mixed_rules: []
api_catalog:
- api_id: "ai-scene-generation-v1"
  name: "AI Scene Generation"
  api_kind: async_command
  protocol: https
  method_or_operation: POST
  path_or_topic: "/v1/scenes/generate"
  purpose: "Generate anime-style scene frames from script segment using diffusion model"
  request:
    content_type: "application/json"
    schema_ref: "#/components/schemas/SceneGenerationRequest"
  response:
    status_codes: [202, 400, 401, 422, 429, 500]
    content_type: "application/json"
    schema_ref: "#/components/schemas/SceneGenerationResponse"
  available_actions: []
  contract_metadata:
    stability: stable
    owner: "ai-engineering-team"
    auth: "required"
    rate_limit_ref: "rl-scene-gen-10rps"
    sla_ref: "sla-scene-gen-p95-2s"
    idempotent: true
    safe: false
  policy_exceptions: []
  error_case_seeds:
  - code: "SCENE_GEN_INVALID_SCRIPT"
    message: "Script segment contains unsupported syntax or exceeds token limit"
    severity: error
    http_status: 422
  - code: "SCENE_GEN_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE"
    message: "Requested model variant is offline or deprecated"
    severity: error
    http_status: 503
  evidence:
    intent_id: "INT-017"
    derived_from_er_ids: ["ER-044", "ER-052"]
    confidence: confirmed
- api_id: "scene-batch-export-v1"
  name: "Scene Batch Export"
  api_kind: batch_import_export
  protocol: https
  method_or_operation: POST
  path_or_topic: "/v1/scenes/export"
  purpose: "Export generated scenes as ZIP archive with metadata and preview thumbnails"
  request:
    content_type: "application/json"
    schema_ref: "#/components/schemas/BatchExportRequest"
  response:
    status_codes: [202, 400, 401, 403, 422]
    content_type: "application/json"
    schema_ref: "#/components/schemas/BatchExportResponse"
  available_actions: []
  contract_metadata:
    stability: stable
    owner: "media-delivery-team"
    auth: "required"
    rate_limit_ref: "rl-batch-export-3rph"
    sla_ref: "sla-batch-export-p95-120s"
    idempotent: false
    safe: false
  policy_exceptions:
  - policy_exception_reason: "File-based export does not fit REST resource model"
    api_style: batch_rpc
  error_case_seeds:
  - code: "EXPORT_INVALID_SCENE_IDS"
    message: "One or more scene IDs do not exist or belong to another user"
    severity: error
    http_status: 404
  - code: "EXPORT_SIZE_EXCEEDED"
    message: "Total exported asset size exceeds 5GB quota"
    severity: error
    http_status: 403
  evidence:
    intent_id: "INT-023"
    derived_from_er_ids: ["ER-067"]
    confidence: confirmed
- api_id: "voice-dubbing-webhook-v1"
  name: "Voice Dubbing Webhook Delivery"
  api_kind: webhook_delivery
  protocol: https
  method_or_operation: POST
  path_or_topic: "<callback_url>"
  purpose: "Deliver completed voice-dubbed audio segments to registered client endpoint"
  request:
    content_type: "application/json"
    schema_ref: "#/components/schemas/VoiceDubbingWebhookPayload"
  response:
    status_codes: [200, 204, 400, 401, 404, 429, 500]
    content_type: "text/plain"
  available_actions: []
  contract_metadata:
    stability: stable
    owner: "audio-engineering-team"
    auth: "signature-header"
    rate_limit_placeholder: "webhook-rate-limit"
    sla_ref: "sla-webhook-delivery-p95-500ms"
    idempotent: true
    safe: true
  policy_exceptions:
  - policy_exception_reason: "Third-party TTS provider requires push-based delivery"
    api_style: webhook
  error_case_seeds:
  - code: "WEBHOOK_INVALID_SIGNATURE"
    message: "Request signature verification failed"
    severity: error
    http_status: 401
  - code: "WEBHOOK_TIMEOUT"
    message: "Client did not respond within 10s timeout"
    severity: warning
    http_status: 408
  evidence:
    intent_id: "INT-041"
    derived_from_er_ids: ["ER-082"]
    confidence: confirmed
- api_id: "project-state-transition-v1"
  name: "Project State Transition"
  api_kind: state_transition
  protocol: https
  method_or_operation: POST
  path_or_topic: "/v1/projects/{project_id}/transition"
  purpose: "Trigger canonical state change (e.g., draft → review → approved → published)"
  request:
    content_type: "application/json"
    schema_ref: "#/components/schemas/StateTransitionRequest"
  response:
    status_codes: [200, 400, 401, 403, 404, 409]
    content_type: "application/json"
    schema_ref: "#/components/schemas/StateTransitionResponse"
  available_actions:
  - "draft-to-review"
  - "review-to-approved"
  - "approved-to-published"
  contract_metadata:
    stability: stable
    owner: "production-workflow-team"
    auth: "required"
    rate_limit_ref: "rl-state-transition-5rps"
    sla_ref: "sla-state-transition-p95-300ms"
    idempotent: true
    safe: false
  policy_exceptions:
  - policy_exception_reason: "State transitions are explicit business actions, not CRUD on resource"
    api_kind: state_transition
  error_case_seeds:
  - code: "TRANSITION_INVALID_FROM_STATE"
    message: "Current project state does not allow this transition"
    severity: error
    http_status: 409
  - code: "TRANSITION_PERMISSION_DENIED"
    message: "User lacks permission for target state"
    severity: error
    http_status: 403
  evidence:
    intent_id: "INT-055"
    derived_from_er_ids: ["ER-091", "ER-093"]
    confidence: confirmed
shared_schemas:
- name: "SceneGenerationRequest"
  description: "Input for AI scene generation job"
  fields:
  - name: "script_segment_id"
    type: "string"
    required: true
    constraints: ["uuid_v4"]
  - name: "model_variant"
    type: "string"
    required: true
    enum: ["anime-v2", "short-drama-v1", "realistic-legacy"]
  - name: "frame_count"
    type: "integer"
    required: false
    default: 12
    constraints: ["min=1", "max=48"]
  - name: "style_prompt"
    type: "string"
    required: false
    constraints: ["max_length=256"]
- name: "SceneGenerationResponse"
  description: "Async response for scene generation"
  fields:
  - name: "job_id"
    type: "string"
    required: true
    constraints: ["uuid_v4"]
  - name: "status_url"
    type: "string"
    required: true
    format: "uri"
  - name: "estimated_completion_seconds"
    type: "integer"
    required: true
- name: "BatchExportRequest"
  description: "Request to export multiple scenes"
  fields:
  - name: "scene_ids"
    type: "array"
    required: true
    items: {type: "string", constraints: ["uuid_v4"]}
  - name: "format"
    type: "string"
    required: false
    default: "zip"
    enum: ["zip", "tar.gz"]
- name: "BatchExportResponse"
  description: "Response for batch export initiation"
  fields:
  - name: "export_id"
    type: "string"
    required: true
    constraints: ["uuid_v4"]
  - name: "download_url"
    type: "string"
    required: false
    format: "uri"
  - name: "expires_at"
    type: "string"
    required: true
    format: "date-time"
pagination_contract:
  style: cursor
  required_headers: ["X-Cursor"]
  optional_headers: ["X-Limit"]
  response_fields:
  - "meta.cursor"
  - "meta.has_more"
  - "meta.count"
consistency_waivers: []
security_refs:
- "SEC-001: JWT validation via Auth0 tenant cinemaai-prod"
- "SEC-003: PII redaction in logs per GDPR Annex A"
nfr_refs:
- "NFR-012: p95 latency < 2s for /scenes/generate"
- "NFR-018: max 10MB payload for /scenes/export"
lifecycle_refs:
- "LC-004: v1 APIs supported until 2026-06-30"
open_questions: []
emit_events:
- event_type: "scene.generation.started"
  payload_schema: "#/components/schemas/SceneGenerationRequest"
- event_type: "project.state.transitioned"
  payload_schema: "#/components/schemas/StateTransitionRequest"
downstream_contract:
  to_044:
    api_policy: "api_policy"
    api_catalog: "api_catalog"
    shared_schemas: "shared_schemas"
    consistency_waivers: "consistency_waivers"
  to_045:
    error_format: "api_policy.error_format"
    error_case_seeds: "[api_catalog[*].error_case_seeds]"
    api_ids: "[api_catalog[*].api_id]"
    auth: "api_policy.auth_baseline"
  to_N190:
    paths: "[api_catalog[*].path_or_topic]"
    operations: "[api_catalog[*].method_or_operation]"
    request_schemas: "[api_catalog[*].request.schema_ref]"
    response_schemas: "[api_catalog[*].response.schema_ref]"
    error_response_format: "api_policy.error_format"
  to_N200:
    dto_schemas: "shared_schemas"
    validation_constraints: "[shared_schemas[*].fields[*].constraints]"
    error_refs: "[api_catalog[*].error_case_seeds[*].code]"
  to_N240:
    api_list: "[api_catalog[*].api_id]"
    negative_scenarios: "[api_catalog[*].error_case_seeds]"
    status_error_mappings: "[api_catalog[*].response.status_codes]"
  to_N330:
    policy: "api_policy"
    catalog: "api_catalog"
    examples: ["examples/scene-generation-request.json", "examples/voice-dubbing-webhook-payload.json"]
    compatibility_notes: "All v1 endpoints support backward-compatible schema evolution per semantic versioning rules"
self_check:
  rule_results:
  - rule_id: R01_api_policy_defined
    severity: reject
    result: pass
  - rule_id: R02_api_catalog_covers_all_intents
    severity: reject
    result: pass
  - rule_id: R03_error_case_seeds_present
    severity: reject
    result: pass
  - rule_id: R04_shared_schemas_extracted
    severity: warn
    result: pass
  - rule_id: R05_downstream_contract_emitted
    severity: reject
    result: pass
  - rule_id: R06_error_case_seeds_per_write_api
    severity: warn
    result: pass
  - rule_id: R07_no_pii_in_query_params
    severity: reject
    result: pass
  - rule_id: R08_openapi_export_has_shared_schemas
    severity: warn
    result: not_applicable
feedback_signal_to_n005:
  signal_type: none
  summary: ""
  target_n070_skills: []
eventbus_subscribers: [N330]
route_back_to: none
```
